Governing Law.standard: Governing law must be explicitly stated and match operating jurisdiction
Governing Law.recommendation_if_missing: Require explicit governing law clause before signing

Termination For Convenience.standard: Either party should retain right to terminate for convenience with 30+ days notice
Termination For Convenience.recommendation_if_missing: Negotiate termination for convenience clause with minimum 30-day notice

Cap On Liability.standard: Liability should be capped at minimum 12 months contract value
Cap On Liability.recommendation_if_missing: Negotiate liability cap — uncapped exposure is unacceptable

Uncapped Liability.standard: Uncapped liability clauses should never be accepted
Uncapped Liability.recommendation_if_present: Reject or renegotiate — uncapped liability is critical risk

IP Ownership Assignment.standard: IP created under contract must be assigned to commissioning party
IP Ownership Assignment.recommendation_if_missing: Add explicit IP assignment clause before signing

Auto-Renewal.standard: Auto-renewal cancellation notice should not exceed 60 days
Auto-Renewal.recommendation_if_missing: Clarify renewal terms and cancellation notice period

Non-Compete.standard: Non-compete scope and duration must be reasonable and clearly defined
Non-Compete.recommendation_if_missing: Define non-compete scope explicitly or remove clause

Audit Rights.standard: Audit rights should be retained by both parties

Insurance.standard: Minimum insurance requirements should be specified

Exclusivity.standard: Exclusivity terms must be clearly scoped by geography, product, and duration
Exclusivity.recommendation_if_missing: Define exclusivity scope precisely or remove clause
